meaning: 9kCntrEdI`stNkF(E)n/n.对比的INktIv/adj.对比的/不同,对照之区别
examples: I refer specifically to permanent residents, in contradistinction to temporary visitors.
The term wealth is wanted to denote the desirable objects which they possess, not inclusive of, but in contradistinction to, their own persons.
This study documents the challenges in achieving bony union in the infected humeral nonunion in contradistinction to the predictable union rates reported for aseptic humeral nonunions.
